Celine’s latest baseball cap in new colors is a must-have, featured throughout the entire runway. The official account shows everyone styling it! A single baseball cap can harmonize and elevate any outfit, pairing perfectly with shirts, jeans, and sneakers to create a unique color vibe. Fashion cycles back, and Celine has revitalized the baseball cap trend! As a symbol of American street style, it represents casual, sporty, and urban looks. Typically matched with hoodies and sneakers, this combo is foolproof. Beyond that, Celine explores new possibilities—mixing baseball caps with leather jackets, dresses, suits, and straight boots. These unexpected pairings prove the baseball cap’s versatility and universal appeal.

Material: polyester + cotton + polyamide. A versatile summer essential and high-street must-have! Matches any style, adding a masterful trendy vibe with effortless street fashion and sophistication.

Made from polyester, cotton, and polyamide, the cap is lightweight, sweat-absorbent, and breathable with strong texture and moderate thickness. Its shape is fuller and more structured than typical baseball caps, making it the most face-slimming cap tried so far. The back features an elastic band, unisex and suitable for all ages and head shapes.
